name: Artichoke-Stuffed Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Frozen or canned artichoke hearts, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a baking pan.
3. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
4. Cut a horizontal pocket into each breast using a very sharp knife, without cutting through the entire breast. Set aside while making the stuffing.
5. In a food processor, combine garlic, artichoke hearts, egg yolk, cream, bread crumbs, nutmeg, and about 1/4 cup of parsley. Process until mixed but not pureed.
6. Stuff each breast pocket with 2 to 3 tablespoons of the mixture. Do not seal the pocket; it will puff up slightly.
7. Place the stuffed breasts in the baking dish. Pour chicken broth over the chicken and sprinkle with paprika.
8. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes.
9. Transfer the breasts to a platter, spooning any pan juices over them, and garnish with the reserved parsley.
